question: Find all users whose email address contains 'gmail.com'.
sql: SELECT username, email, name, surname FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`users` WHERE email LIKE '%gmail.com%'

question: List all articles that belong to the category named 'Technology'.
sql: SELECT articlesid, title, description FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`articles` WHERE categoryid = 'Technology'

question: Show the title and description of each article along with the category description for that article.
sql: SELECT a.articlesid, a.title, a.description, c.description AS category_description FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`articles` a JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`category` c ON a.categoryid = c.name

question: List all materials along with the title of the article they belong to.
sql: SELECT m.materialid, m.filepath, m.virustotalurl, a.title FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`material` m JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`articles` a ON m.articlesid = a.articlesid

question: How many articles has each advertiser published? Show the advertiser ID and the count of articles.
sql: SELECT advertiserid, COUNT(articlesid) AS article_count FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`articles` GROUP BY advertiserid

question: How many articles exist in each category? Return the category name and the article count, ordered by article count descending.
sql: SELECT categoryid, COUNT(articlesid) AS article_count FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_289361_schema`.`articles` GROUP BY categoryid ORDER BY article_count DESC
